turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a table at a restaurant 🗨️ “Hi, I’d like to book a table for two tonight.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What time would you like the table for tonight?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hello, I would like to book a table tonight, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! Do you have a preferred time for your reservation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, no.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries at all! In that case, would you like to let me know what time range works best for you, or should I suggest some available slots?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, I'm sorry. Can you do that again, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, no problem at all! Just let me know what time you’d like your reservation, or if you’d like me to recommend some available times for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So please, 8pm.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! A table for two at 8 p.m. it is. Could you also let me know the name for the reservation and any special requests?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, my name is Pedro.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, thank you, Pedro! And just to confirm, is there anything specific you’d like, such as a preference for seating or any dietary restrictions?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So do we have any tables in outside?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do have outdoor seating available! Would you like to request an outdoor table for your reservation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I’ll make sure to reserve an outdoor table for you at 8 p.m. for two people. Is there anything else I can help you with, or is that all set?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have any recommendations for what I drink today?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We have some great options, like our signature cocktails, or some refreshing mocktails. Do you have a preference for something sweet, fruity, or maybe something more classic?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So can you have a speech for me while I...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll make sure to have a nice spritz ready for you. If you have any other requests or need anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, that's it.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Wonderful! All set then. I’ll see you tonight at 8 p.m. for your reservation. If you need anything else, just let me know. Looking forward to having you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you. Have a good day.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! You have a great day as well, and I’ll see you tonight. Take care!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you, bye.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! Bye for now, and have a great one!
